known_issues: Intermittent error: 'Start Anonymously' page sometimes fails to open after navigating through Login and Chat pages, showing 'something unexpected happened'.

existing_features.title: Eliminate the intermittent "Something unexpected happened" crash when the user clicks "Start Anonymously" after navigating through the login flow and the anonymous chat experience, ensuring the Experience view always opens reliably.

Make landing/experience navigation state robust by keeping the UI state in MindVaultLandingPage in sync with browser history state during open/close and back navigation (including repeated open/close cycles).
Improve diagnostics for this crash by capturing and surfacing the underlying runtime error details when the ErrorBoundary is hit (while keeping user-facing copy in English and unchanged in meaning).

projectName: Fix intermittent crash when opening 'Start Anonymously' after navigating through Login/Chat
